regional_cost_note: Surveyors in Porirua typically charge $1,300–$3,800 for a boundary survey, $4,500–$28,000+ for subdivision, and $900–$2,800 for a building setout. Porirua trades often price at Wellington rates given the shared labour pool. Title searches and LIM reports are recommended before any boundary-related work — your surveyor can advise.
